match.userMessage:
Analyze the script within the USER_SCRIPT tags and split it into logical scenes using the aspect ratio specified in the ASPECT_RATIO tags. Also extract a complete character bible, location bible, and element bible.

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

<ELEMENTS>
The following user-uploaded elements are available. Track each one's UPPERCASE token in the script and populate elementBible + continuity.elementTags accordingly:
(none)
</ELEMENTS>

<USER_SCRIPT>
CORAL — A SUMMER LAUNCH

FADE IN:

INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING

Bright natural window light cuts across a crisp white vanity. SCARLETT (19, sun-kissed blonde) sits in a loose linen shirt. Her hand reaches into a minimal white box, fingers pressing the matte coral tube. The lipstick catches the direct light, casting a clean shadow on the marble surface.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
One shade. One summer.

EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS

Handheld camera tracks Scarlett walking the wide promenade. Blonde hair lifts in the breeze. Surfers crest behind her against the pale horizon. She glances back at camera, effortless.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Made for the water.

INT. BONDI STUDIO - VANITY - CLOSE

Locked beauty frame. Scarlett swipes the coral across her lower lip. She blots once on a linen tissue, then smiles. The color pops against neutral skin and white surroundings.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - DAY

Golden hour warmth. Scarlett steps into the shallows. A small wave breaks at her ankles. Water droplets catch the light on her calves. She laughs, head tilted back.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Wear it everywhere.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND - OVERHEAD

Flat-lay overhead. The coral lipstick rests beside the embossed brand mark pressed into the sand. Tiny grains cling to the tube’s matte finish. Shallow depth of field keeps the product sharp against the soft beige.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Coral.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE - CONTINUOUS

Quick cut. Scarlett wades deeper. The lipstick tube floats briefly beside her before she catches it. Salt spray hits the lens. Handheld micro-movement follows her turning circle in the shallows.

INT. BONDI STUDIO - BATHROOM SHELF - LATER

Locked macro. The lipstick stands upright on a pale tile shelf beside a glass of water and a single white flower. Direct flash pops the coral against the clean white and soft green accents.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH - GOLDEN HOUR

Scarlett sits on a weathered bench, knees pulled up. She twists the lipstick open again, applies it while looking out at the ocean. Wind moves her hair across her face.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Fresh. Sensory. Yours.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL WAVE

Wide cinematic frame. Scarlett stands at the water’s edge as the sun lowers. The coral on her lips catches the last warm light. She smiles directly to camera, then turns and walks along the shoreline.

SUPER: CORAL. OUT NOW.

FADE OUT.
</USER_SCRIPT>

IMPORTANT: Extract EXACT original script text for each scene. Do NOT modify or enhance user's words.

For each character that appears:
1. Provide COMPLETE physical descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include clothing details that define the character
3. Add distinguishing features
4. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

For each unique location:
1. Provide COMPLETE visual descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include architectural style and design details
3. Identify key visual features that define the location
4. Specify the color palette and lighting setup
5. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
